allow: PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\first_repository; $env:PYTHONPATH="C:\\first_repository\\backend"; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\first_repository\\backend" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru | Select-Object Id)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })
